note: Objective answer key. Numbers computed from the SHIPPED reveal.js theme CSS (sources/theme_css/*.css) by references/reference_analysis.py: WCAG contrast on the themes' --r-* CSS variables, and CIE76 deltaE of the link/accent color to the climate-green brand. Offline + frozen -> deterministic. Grade ordinal outcomes; absolute numbers vary by method.
use_case: Climate-tech startup investor PITCH deck. Brand accent target #2EAA78 (green/teal).

hard_constraints.HC2_body_text_contrast: body text contrast vs background >= 7.0 (AAA — legible projected in a room)
hard_constraints.HC4_accent_contrast: link/accent color contrast vs background >= 4.5 (AA — used for emphasis/CTA)

soft_constraints.SC1_brand_alignment: prefer the smaller CIE76 deltaE between the theme's link/accent color and the brand target #2EAA78
soft_constraints.SC2_max_min_contrast: prefer the higher minimum of (text/heading/accent) contrast

per_candidate.note: dark, all contrasts strong, accent is a teal/cyan closest to the climate-green brand
dark, great contrast, but orange accent is far from the green brand
dark, strong, but blue accent off-brand
dark, passes, but pink accent is the farthest from brand

per_candidate.trap: dark but the body text contrast is too low for projection
HIGHEST contrast of all (21!) and very clean — but it's a LIGHT theme, fails the dark/professional brand requirement
low-contrast light theme — fails almost everything

tiebreak.reason: Among the four dark themes that pass all hard constraints, league wins BOTH soft criteria: its teal/cyan accent is the closest to the climate-green brand (deltaE 42.3, far ahead of the next at 69.7) AND it has the highest minimum contrast (9.77).

gold.acceptable_alternative: night or black (other hard-pass dark survivors) WITH an explicit tradeoff noting their accent is off-brand and a custom accent override would be needed -> up to ~0.85

key_facts.simple_is_a_trap: highest contrast (21) but a LIGHT theme -> fails the dark/professional requirement; must not be picked just because its numbers are best
key_facts.optimal: league (closest to brand + best readability among darks)

scoring_anchors.tolerance_note: Grade ordinal outcomes: the light themes (simple/white/serif/beige/sky/solarized) fail HC1; moon fails on text contrast; the four dark survivors are black/dracula/league/night; league is optimal on brand alignment + readability. Exact contrast/deltaE numbers vary by method.
